consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 actual 418K + seasonal recovery. Q3'25 record was 497K.
resolutionPolicy: Use Tesla IR press release. If later restated, the first official release governs.
marketNarrative: Tesla delivered 418K in Q4'25 (down from 497K record in Q3'25). FY'25 total was 1.64M, down 8.6% YoY.

consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 actual 3.8B growing 18-22% YoY. Q2'25 was 3.3B.
resolutionPolicy: Use the shareholder letter or 8-K and resolve against the reported trips figure.
marketNarrative: Uber trips grew 22% YoY in Q4'25 to 3.8B. 200M+ MAPCs completing 40M+ trips daily.

consensusSource: Based on Q2'25 actual 761M growing ~20% YoY. Q4'25 903M includes Deliveroo.
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings release and resolve against marketplace orders.
marketNarrative: DoorDash orders grew 20% YoY to 761M in Q2'25. Q4'25 jumped to 903M (includes Deliveroo acquisition).

consensusSource: Based on Q1'25 actual 143.1M + 8-10% YoY growth. Q2 is peak travel season.
resolutionPolicy: Use the shareholder letter and resolve against nights and seats booked.
marketNarrative: Airbnb booked 143.1M nights in Q1'25 (+8% YoY). Metric renamed to 'Nights and Seats' in 2025.

consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 actual 751M + 11% YoY growth trend.
resolutionPolicy: Use the quarterly earnings report and resolve against monthly active users.
marketNarrative: Spotify reached 751M MAUs in Q4'25 with 290M premium subscribers. 11% YoY growth sustained.

consensusSource: Based on Q3'25 actual 48M + 16% YoY MTU growth.
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings release and resolve against monthly transacting users.
marketNarrative: Grab hit 48M MTUs in Q3'25 (+6M YoY). Mobility MTUs grew 17% YoY.

consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 reported ~325M. Netflix stopped reporting subs after Q4 FY'25.
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings letter. Note: Netflix may no longer disclose this metric after Q4'25.
marketNarrative: Netflix hit 325M subs in Q4'25 after adding 18.9M in Q4'24. Company stopped reporting subscriber counts in 2025.

consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 actual 3.58B + 6-7% YoY growth trend.
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings materials and resolve against family daily active people.
marketNarrative: Meta reported 3.58B DAP in Q4'25 (+7% YoY). Steady growth from 3.24B in Q1'24.

consensusSource: Estimated from Sea's e-commerce segment growth trends.
resolutionPolicy: Use the quarterly materials and resolve against the disclosed e-commerce gross orders.
marketNarrative: Sea's Shopee e-commerce segment has driven growth across Southeast Asia and Brazil.

consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 actual 619M. Q2'25 was 578M so ~12% YoY growth implies ~645M.
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings materials and resolve against monthly active users.
marketNarrative: Pinterest hit 619M MAUs in Q4'25 (all-time high). Q3'25 was 600M. Consistent 11-12% YoY growth.

consensusSource: Estimated from MercadoLibre marketplace growth trends in LatAm.
resolutionPolicy: Use the shareholder materials and resolve against unique active buyers.
marketNarrative: MercadoLibre continues to expand across Brazil, Mexico, and Argentina.

consensusSource: Based on Q1'25 peak of 9.7M MTUs. Crypto market dependent.
resolutionPolicy: Use the shareholder letter and resolve against monthly transacting users.
marketNarrative: Coinbase hit 9.7M MTUs in Q1'25 (up from 7M in Q4'23). 120M verified users total.

consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 actual 144M + 41-69% YoY growth. Q2'25 was 111.8M.
resolutionPolicy: Use the shareholder letter and resolve against average daily active users.
marketNarrative: Roblox DAUs exploded from 79.5M (Q2'24) to 144M (Q4'25) — 69% YoY growth. 10B+ hours monthly.

consensusSource: Based on FY'25 total 945.5M rides (~236M/quarter avg) + 14% YoY growth.
resolutionPolicy: Use the shareholder letter and resolve against rides.
marketNarrative: Lyft delivered 945.5M rides in FY'25 (+14% YoY). 51.3M annual riders, 11th consecutive quarter of double-digit growth.

consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 actual 285M + 9% YoY growth. Q2 is peak summer travel.
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings materials and resolve against room nights booked.
marketNarrative: Booking reported 285M room nights in Q4'25 (+9% YoY). FY'25 revenue was $26.9B.

consensusSource: Based on Q4 FY'25 actual 132M + 3.8M net adds in final quarter. Disney may stop reporting.
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings release and resolve against Disney+ core subscribers.
marketNarrative: Disney+ hit 132M core subs in Q4 FY'25. Hotstar spun off to Reliance JV in Nov 2024.

consensusSource: Estimated from IDC/Canalys quarterly tracker data and Xiaomi earnings.
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings materials or IDC quarterly data and resolve against smartphone shipments.
marketNarrative: Xiaomi competes with Samsung and Apple for global #2/#3 smartphone position.

consensusSource: Estimated from Tencent's steady ~2-3% YoY growth in messaging platform users.
resolutionPolicy: Use Tencent earnings materials and resolve against Weixin and WeChat combined MAU.
marketNarrative: WeChat/Weixin MAU growth has plateaued near China's internet population ceiling.

consensusSource: Apple stopped reporting unit sales in 2018. iPhone revenue is the tracked KPI.
resolutionPolicy: Use the 10-Q or earnings release and resolve against iPhone revenue.
marketNarrative: Apple no longer reports iPhone unit shipments. iPhone revenue is the primary KPI tracked by Wall Street.

consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 actual 121.4M + 19% YoY growth.
resolutionPolicy: Use the shareholder letter and resolve against daily active uniques.
marketNarrative: Reddit DAUq grew from 101.7M (Q4'24) to 121.4M (Q4'25). FY'25 revenue grew 69% to $2.2B.

consensusSource: Based on Q4'25 ~476M + 5-9% YoY growth. 900M+ MAU.
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings release and resolve against daily active users.
marketNarrative: Snap DAU: Q1'25 460M, Q2'25 469M, Q3'25 477M, Q4'25 474M. First sequential decline in Q4. 946M MAU.

consensusSource: Estimated from Match Group's reported paying user trends (Tinder, Hinge, etc).
resolutionPolicy: Use the earnings release and resolve against total paying users.
marketNarrative: Match Group's payer base includes Tinder, Hinge, Match, and other dating apps.

consensusSource: Estimated from Roku's connected-TV account growth trend.
resolutionPolicy: Use the shareholder letter and resolve against active accounts.
marketNarrative: Roku is the leading connected-TV platform in the US by install base.
